step_rationale: Oxidized phospholipid product; accumulated in atherosclerotic lesions.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylethanolamine is an oxidized phospholipid product that accumulates in atherosclerotic plaques and promotes inflammatory activation.

references.title: The Synergistic Mechanism of Total Saponins and Flavonoids in Notoginseng-Safflower against Myocardial Infarction Using a Comprehensive Metabolomics Strategy.
